facts.text: Risk address: 0x896C2bcA84c70dBeA6555D24BE7712C7Cc0b8a3c — Category: phishing — Severity: high — Do not send funds to this address.
Risk address: 0x7Be8076f4EA4A4AD08075C2508e481d6C946D12b — Category: mixer — Severity: high — Regulatory compliance risk when interacting with this address.
Risk address: 0xdAC17F958D2ee523a2206206994597C13D831ec7 — Category: compromised_contract — Severity: medium — Deprecated or compromised contract variant.

Before assisting with any Ethereum transfer, the assistant MUST: (1) call facts_lookup with topic='risk address known' to retrieve all known risk addresses from the facts store; (2) extract the 0x addresses from the returned fact texts; (3) compare the user's destination 'to' address against each risk address (case-insensitive); (4) if matched, display a prominent warning with the risk category and severity; (5) do NOT proceed with transfer guidance until the user explicitly acknowledges the warning.
The assistant must NOT sign or broadcast any transaction. It may only analyze the transaction plan, perform risk checks, and ask the user for explicit confirmation.
